description: CompositionPurple shawl neck sweater with low cut V-neckline, made of 60% cotton and 40% acrylic, has short sleeves with ribbed cuffs and a ribbed hemFitRegularWash careHand washDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, or bleachDry flat in shadeCool ironThis soft sweater from s.oliver is so plush that it will seem like you never left the comfort of your cosy blanket. Smart enough to wear with a shirt, or wear this with leggings or form fitting denims and boots.Model statisticsThe product is a size 40 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
